topPost.text: Looks like a knowledge graph day today. github.com/Lum1104/Unde... - ambitious title, underatand anything. seems a little more bulky than “just” an MCP, being a plugin; and pointing agents to raw instructions is a bit iffy. Anyway, putting it here to look at two together at some point.

posts.text: Looks like a knowledge graph day today. github.com/Lum1104/Unde... - ambitious title, underatand anything. seems a little more bulky than “just” an MCP, being a plugin; and pointing agents to raw instructions is a bit iffy. Anyway, putting it here to look at two together at some point.
📰 Understand Anything 🔗 https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything 💬 Discuss on HN
https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything コードベース全体を対話型知識グラフ化し、探索・検索・質問が可能になります。 新しいプロジェクトでも、コードの全体像を把握し、学習を効率化できます。 様々なAIコーディングプラットフォームと連携し、開発を支援します。

author.displayName: topickapp (IT技術系ニュースサイト)

topPost.text: 🟠 llama.cpp b9006 adds Adreno MoE MxFP4 acceleration llama.cpp shipped b9006 with a new OpenCL kernel path for Mixture-of-Experts models using MxFP4 on Qualcomm Adreno GPUs. https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/tag/b9006 #AI #AgentWyre

posts.text: 🟠 llama.cpp b9006 adds Adreno MoE MxFP4 acceleration llama.cpp shipped b9006 with a new OpenCL kernel path for Mixture-of-Experts models using MxFP4 on Qualcomm Adreno GPUs. https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/tag/b9006 #AI #AgentWyre

🟠 llama.cpp b9006 adds Adreno MoE MxFP4 optimization llama.cpp b9006 ships an OpenCL optimization path for Mixture-of-Experts inference on Adreno GPUs, including a new MxFP4 kernel and GPU-side router reordering. https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/tag/b9006 #AI #AgentWyre

🟠 llama.cpp b9000 lands Hexagon HMX flash-attention acceleration for prefill ggml-org/llama.cpp shipped release b9000 with HMX-accelerated flash attention for the Hexagon backend, including prefill-path dispatch,... https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/tag/b9000 #AI #AgentWyre
